[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001010110 4
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 011011000 4

56 65 011011100 5
67 76 001010110 4 match 0
70 07 001010010 3

13 31 000000000 a match 1 2 3 4 5 6
